case_title: LOUELLA BRANDON UKU VS. ANDREA MANIQUE CELESTINE

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO AUG-31-2011 AT 1:30 PM DEPT.#506. - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
